---
name: Bug Report
description: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in Harmonix
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 23.10]
- **Harmonix version**: [e.g., v0.1.0]
- **Installation method**: [e.g., installer, `npm run dev`]
- **Active sources**: [e.g., Spotify, YouTube Music, Local]

## Logs

<details>
<summary>Click to expand logs</summary>

```
Paste relevant logs here (remove any sensitive info like tokens)
```

</details>

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., does it happen with all sources? only one specific source?).

## Possible Solution

(Optional) If you have a suggestion on how to fix the bug, describe it here.
